bird.name: Atuen antpitta
bird.summary: The Atuen antpitta, or southern tawny antpitta, (Grallaria atuensis) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Peru.

relations.subject: Atuen antpitta
relations.evidence: |year=2017 |amends=2016 |title=Atuen Antpitta Grallaria atuensis |volume=2017 |article-number=e.T103660431A112315904 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2017-1.RLTS.T103660431A112315904.en |access-date=17 September 2024}} | genus = Grallaria | species = atuensis | authority = Carriker, 1933 | synonyms = | range_map = Grallaria atuensis map.svg | range_map_caption = Range in Peru }} The Atuen antpitta, or southern tawny antpitta, (Grallaria atuensis) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae

relations.subject: Atuen antpitta
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits the páramo and nearby montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
